title: Guest speaker — Scott King
content:
Hi everyone,


Tomorrow, we will have our first entrepreneur guest lecturer, Scott King, in class. Scott has been active (and successful!) in running startups and is now engaged in leading environmental initiatives. I'm sure you will learn a ton from him.


Scott has asked me to send you this short report: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1O850iVha4u86cTNugtN-FuM_OQUTDje8m_epbW3tsuk/edit?usp=sharing Links to an external site. 


Give it a read before the class. Also, don't shy away from asking questions.


Cheers,
Sina
